examples.detection_note: No executable code blocks detected (13873 data-only blocks found). Site may use non-standard code rendering that the auditor does not recognize, or all examples are in data formats (YAML/JSON).

top_findings: Link verification inconclusive for 5 URLs (auth/rate-limit/server block); these are excluded from broken-link counts.
API usage-doc coverage is low: 14.47% (940 API pages detected)
Example reliability: 0% on 4005 pages (likely detection limitation). Site may use JS-rendered code blocks.
Freshness visibility is weak: only 2.6% pages show last updated

analysis.executive_summary: Audit crawled 4,005 pages across https://docs.wandb.ai/ with 100% crawl coverage and 86.85% overall confidence. Identified 38 confirmed broken internal documentation links with no repository navigation link failures. API reference coverage is critically low at 14.47% despite detecting 940 API pages. Example code reliability detection returned 0%, indicating a likely technical detection limitation with JavaScript-rendered content. Freshness metadata is visible on only 2.6% of pages, and SEO/geographic issues affect 17.07% of content.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage at 100% (4,005 of 4,030 in-scope pages successfully crawled)
High overall audit confidence at 86.85% with strong crawl confidence at 95%
Large API surface detected with 940 API-related pages identified
Effective trap URL filtering (12,310 URLs skipped, preventing crawl pollution)
risks: 38 confirmed broken internal documentation links degrading user navigation and trust
API reference coverage at 14.47% leaves 85%+ of API surface without usage documentation or examples
Example code reliability at 0% suggests users cannot verify working code samples (likely detection issue, but user impact unknown)
Only 2.6% of pages display last-updated metadata, obscuring content freshness for 97.4% of documentation
SEO/geographic issue rate of 17.07% may limit discoverability and international reach
5 unverified links due to authentication/rate-limiting/server blocks represent potential hidden broken links
Detection limitations on example reliability (0% on 4,005 pages) prevent validation of critical code samples

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 38 confirmed broken internal documentation links to restore navigation integrity
Increase API usage documentation coverage from 14.47% to minimum 60% by adding code examples and integration guides for top 50 API endpoints
Implement last-updated timestamps on all documentation pages (currently 2.6% coverage) to improve trust and maintenance visibility
Investigate and resolve example code detection failure (0% reliability score) by ensuring code blocks are server-rendered or accessible to audit tooling
Audit and remediate SEO/geographic issues affecting 17.07% of pages to improve search discoverability and international accessibility

limitations: External audit cannot verify authentication-protected content; 5 unverified links may include false negatives
0% example reliability score likely reflects detection limitation with JavaScript-rendered code blocks rather than actual code quality
Audit cannot validate functional correctness of API documentation or whether detected API pages represent complete API surface
SEO/geographic issue detection does not measure actual search ranking performance or user acquisition impact
Crawl cannot assess documentation accuracy, technical correctness, or alignment with current product functionality
